primary_sources.title: Letters Patent of Appointment of Prime Minister, 21 August 2021
SPR Official Results, GE15 (19 November 2022) — hung parliament

notes: 9th PM. UMNO. Appointed by YDPA 21 August 2021 after Muhyiddin's resignation. Held office on a confidence-and-supply arrangement with PH (first opposition-cooperation MoU in Malaysian history, September 2021). Dissolved parliament 10 October 2022 over UMNO grassroots pressure; GE15 produced hung parliament leading to YDPA appointment of Anwar 24 November 2022.
